home.title: Where to?
home.locationPermissionMessage: This app needs access to your location to show your current position.

home.destinationLoadError: Could not load destination details. Please try again.
home.routeError: Could not calculate the route. Please try again.
home.mapsKeyMissingTitle: Google Maps API key is missing
home.mapsKeyMissingMessage: Add a real Google Maps API key in GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY inside your .env file.
